title: Assigning to constants!
body:
```
  ; CHECK-LABEL: module IsInvalid(
  ; CHECK-NEXT:    input a);
  module IsInvalid :
    output a: Analog<1>
    a is invalid  @[Place.scala 101]
```
Generates this awesome verilog:
```
module IsInvalid(
  input a);


  `ifndef SYNTHESIS
    alias a = '0;       // Place.scala:101
  `endif
  `ifdef SYNTHESIS
    assign '0 = a;      // Place.scala:101
    assign a = '0;      // Place.scala:101
  `endif // SYNTHESIS
endmodule
```
